evidenceTiers.observed_recent_window: Decoded finalized transaction with signer layout, logs, CPI stack and token deltas in the 5,226-transaction window.
evidenceTiers.observed_legacy_stratified_sample: Decoded finalized transaction in the earlier temporal-stratified sample but outside the latest 5,226 window.
evidenceTiers.binary_surface_only: Method label/source symbols and validation strings in the current on-chain ProgramData binary; no recent execution proof.
evidenceTiers.inferred: Structural interpretation from account layout, owner relationships or atomic correlation; explicitly marked and not treated as authority proof.

historyCoverage.snapshotSemantics: Complete for this address as of newestSignature/toUtc; later transactions can naturally appear after the snapshot.

decodedRecentWindow.strategy: latest 5,226 address-referencing transactions fully decoded with log-stack CPI frames
decodedRecentWindow.caveat: Counts and volumes describe this decoded window, not all 202,066 historical signatures. Failed transactions contribute method attempts but no finalized state transition.

xplace1.interpretation: The 5,066 UserAccount records are per-user XPlace state. Their lamports and protocol positions are not direct CH funds. The 1,886 links matching current XPlace 2 CardAccount records are a snapshot join; unmatched links can reflect inactive/migrated/versioned card state.

xplace2.interpretation: The 3,168 CardAccount records encode per-card limits/state and are not direct CH balances.

xplace2ConfigVault.access: program-controlled; CH is embedded operational authority, not token-account owner and not upgrade authority; movement remains instruction/constraint bound

xplace1ConfigVault.access: program-controlled; CH is embedded operational authority, not token-account owner and not upgrade authority

directKamino.access: no direct CH-owned position; observed via XPlace-owned user/obligation accounts

directDrift.access: no Drift User account whose authority is CH; observed via XPlace proxy accounts

currentFundsAndAttribution.attributionRule: Only the System balance and token accounts whose token owner is CH are direct CH funds. XPlace Config/PDA balances and XPlace-managed Kamino/Drift positions are program/user state governed by instruction constraints, not a free CH balance.

exactKaminoCollateralWithdrawal.signerConclusion: The concrete 3.5 USDT withdrawal is a two-signer transaction: CH plus the XPlace user. It proves CH participation and fee-payer/operational authority, not an unconstrained CH-only withdrawal.
exactKaminoCollateralWithdrawal.interpretation: This is Kamino lending-collateral redemption (burn reserve collateral receipt and withdraw underlying USDT), not removal of a persistent Jupiter/Orca/Raydium/Meteora LP position.

recentProtocolPrograms.ownershipInterpretation: The recent transactions transfer USDC into a token account owned by this bridge program; the bridge program itself is not invoked in those same transactions, so the transfer is settlement input rather than proof of an inline cross-chain completion.

limitations: The full signature crawl is complete at signature level for the recorded snapshot, while instruction-level decoding is complete for the latest 5,226 transactions plus an earlier stratified sample.

Binary method presence is not access proof. Access claims require a successful observed signer layout and remain limited by account, whitelist, token, oracle, balance, limit, downstream-program and atomic-bundle checks.
Routed DEX AddLiquidity/Deposit/Withdraw CPIs can be transient swap mechanics. They are not counted as persistent CH liquidity positions without a CH-owned position/share/NFT account.
XPlace-managed user collateral, debt, card balances and all program-owned rent are not added to CH direct net worth.
Recent-window token deltas are flow volume, not current balances and not all-time volume.
